data.name: Basti

weaponImprint.name: Death's Psalm
weaponImprint.trait: AoE damage dealt by the user and their [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] is increased by 5%. If dealing AoE Corrosion damage, damage dealt is additionally increased by 5%.
weaponImprint.effect: All Corrosion damage dealt by allied units is increased by 10%. For every summon the user creates, the Corrosion damage dealt by both the user and their summons is increased by 5%/7%/9%/11%/13%/15%, up to a maximum of 15%/21%/27%/33%/39%/45%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Corrosion-type debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Increase damage dealt to the Ouroboros Consortium units by 2.5%.

data.effects:
It's difficult to evaluate Basti's resume. In the eyes of those in power, it's a criminal record; in the eyes of local factions, it's a threatening letter; but in the Commander's eyes, it's a moving love letter.
"Darling, want to know my secrets? The way things are now isn't enough—you need to be bolder, even bolder—"

skills.name: Reckless Provocation
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Graffiti World
skills.description:
At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
At the start of battle, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles on all allied Dolls' positions, lasting for 2 turns. After moving, leaves [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within 1 tile around self, lasting for 2 turns.
If an enemy target is standing on an allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tile, it gains [effect:d15b5821-0880-4d68-a42d-95c3c38c86d2].
When [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is summoned and at the start of action, if allied units are standing on allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles, they gain [effect:072e8edf-84d8-49ec-a5ef-e0121e79c62c] and [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Reduces stability damage taken by 1 point. At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

At the start of battle, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles on all allied Dolls' positions and within a 3x3 area around them, lasting for 2 turns. After moving, leaves [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within 3 tiles around self, lasting for 2 turns.
If an enemy target is standing on an allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tile, it gains [effect:d15b5821-0880-4d68-a42d-95c3c38c86d2].
When [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is summoned and at the start of action, if allied units are standing on allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles, they gain [effect:072e8edf-84d8-49ec-a5ef-e0121e79c62c] and [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 2 turns.

Before dealing damage, Basti and [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] gain 1 stack of [effect:fbd7a19a-c207-43df-8bc4-d911baf325f1].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Reduces stability damage taken by 1 point. At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

At the start of battle, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles on all allied Dolls' positions and within a 3x3 area around them, lasting for 2 turns. After moving, leaves [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within 3 tiles around self, lasting for 2 turns.
If an enemy target is standing on an allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tile, it gains [effect:d15b5821-0880-4d68-a42d-95c3c38c86d2].
When [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is summoned and at the start of action, if allied units are standing on allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles, they gain [effect:072e8edf-84d8-49ec-a5ef-e0121e79c62c] and [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 2 turns.

Before dealing damage, Basti and [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] gain 1 stack of [effect:fbd7a19a-c207-43df-8bc4-d911baf325f1].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Reduces stability damage taken by 1 point.
At the start of battle, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles on the tiles where all allied Dolls are located and within a 3×3 area, lasting for 2 turns. After moving, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within 3 tiles around herself, lasting for 2 turns.
Before dealing damage, Basti and [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] gain 1 stack of [effect:fbd7a19a-c207-43df-8bc4-d911baf325f1].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:fbd7a19a-c207-43df-8bc4-d911baf325f1] is enhanced: damage dealt is increased to 24%, and healing done is increased to 6%.
[effect:072e8edf-84d8-49ec-a5ef-e0121e79c62c] is enhanced: damage dealt is increased to 30%.
[effect:d15b5821-0880-4d68-a42d-95c3c38c86d2] is enhanced: Corrosion damage taken is increased to 30%, and the HP healed to the attacker when the holder takes Corrosion damage is increased to 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: Bad Influence
skills.description:
Selects an ally within 6 tiles, then selects 1 allied empty [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tile.

Teleport selected ally to that tile, restores HP equal to 100% of attack and 5 points of Stability Index, cleanses 2 debuffs and apply [effect:a8794e8b-ebb5-4c04-8f8a-ea7497c112d5] for 2 turns.

Teleports Basti to an empty tile within 1 tile of the selected ally's location.

After skill usage, Basti gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

skills.name: Jirai Shoujo
skills.description:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used twice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 3 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 2 summons can exist on the field at the same time.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used thrice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 5 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 3 summons can exist on the field at the same time.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. Each time a [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] self-destructs, the attack of Basti and other [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is increased by 3%. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used thrice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 5 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 130% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and 1 random powerful debuff to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 3 summons can exist on the field at the same time.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Attack range is increased by 2 tiles. This skill can be used thrice per turn.
[effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is enhanced: The effective area is increased to 5 tiles and the maximum number of summons on the field has been increased to 3.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
After each [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] self-detonates, the attack of Basti and other Cutie Pie is increased by 3%.
[effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is enhanced: Damage multiplier increased to 130% and 1 random powerful debuff is applied when damage is dealt.

skills.name: Sugar-Coated Trap
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 150% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 1 stack of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 200% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 1 stack of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1] and 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9]. After using this skill, heal all ally units for HP equal to 50% of attack and cleanses 2 debuffs.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 200% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 3 stacks of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1] and 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9]. For each target hit, damage dealt is increase by 20%, up to a maximum of 100%. After using this skill, heal all ally units for HP equal to 50% of attack, cleanses 2 debuffs, and cleanses the effects of [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The damage multiplier increased to 200%.
Apply 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9].
After the skill usage, heal all ally units for HP equal to 50% of attack and cleanse 2 debuffs.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Apply 3 stacks of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1], and its damage multiplier is increased to 200%.
For each target hit, the damage dealt is increased by 20%, up to a maximum of 100%.
After skill usage, additionally cleanses the effects of [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.

keys.effect: If an enemy is on a Corrosion-type tile, damage dealt to them is increased by 10%.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
If allied [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles exist on battlefield, all allied units' Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 7%.

After being afflicted with [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], or [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] immediately cleanse that effect. Can trigger at most once per battle. At the start of battle, gains [effect:16e665b8-d576-4fc1-9c34-838e33b2e7ad] for 3 turns.

When a [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is summoned, restores HP equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of Stability Index to the allied target with the lowest current HP on the field; this can trigger up to once per turn.
Before a [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] attacks, cleanses 1 buff from the target.
When a [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is summoned, creates a [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tile at its position.

vertebrae.effect:
Attack range is increased by 2 tiles. This skill can be used thrice per turn.
[effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is enhanced: The effective area is increased to 5 tiles and the maximum number of summons on the field has been increased to 3.

doll.name: Basti
doll.effects:
It's difficult to evaluate Basti's resume. In the eyes of those in power, it's a criminal record; in the eyes of local factions, it's a threatening letter; but in the Commander's eyes, it's a moving love letter.
"Darling, want to know my secrets? The way things are now isn't enough—you need to be bolder, even bolder—"

doll.name: Basti
doll.effects:
It's difficult to evaluate Basti's resume. In the eyes of those in power, it's a criminal record; in the eyes of local factions, it's a threatening letter; but in the Commander's eyes, it's a moving love letter.
"Darling, want to know my secrets? The way things are now isn't enough—you need to be bolder, even bolder—"

skillsLevel2.name: Sugar-Coated Trap
skillsLevel2.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 150% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 1 stack of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1].
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 200% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 1 stack of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1] and 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9]. After using this skill, heal all ally units for HP equal to 50% of attack and cleanses 2 debuffs.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 200% of attack to the target and all enemies within 8 tiles of the center, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns, and applies 3 stacks of [effect:710719e9-0d03-47d2-9e55-9f87e7d0fcc1] and 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9]. For each target hit, damage dealt is increase by 20%, up to a maximum of 100%. After using this skill, heal all ally units for HP equal to 50% of attack, cleanses 2 debuffs, and cleanses the effects of [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units.

[effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is enhanced: Damage multiplier increased to 130% and 1 random powerful debuff is applied when damage is dealt.

doll.name: Basti
doll.effects:
It's difficult to evaluate Basti's resume. In the eyes of those in power, it's a criminal record; in the eyes of local factions, it's a threatening letter; but in the Commander's eyes, it's a moving love letter.
"Darling, want to know my secrets? The way things are now isn't enough—you need to be bolder, even bolder—"

skillsLevel3.name: Jirai Shoujo
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used twice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 3 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 2 summons can exist on the field at the same time.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used thrice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 5 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 3 summons can exist on the field at the same time.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and summons 1 [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a]. Each time a [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] self-destructs, the attack of Basti and other [effect:fad26e78-c747-42da-878f-83d32202402a] is increased by 3%. After using this skill, Basti can use the active skill [dollSkill:c3425a26-546f-4810-8656-7d68f7394a9b], the active skill [dollSkill:1ed67625-8bd2-45bf-9b65-c6d99cad7320] or the ultimate skill [dollSkill:15cbad75-5fef-4332-ad12-3d8c685b173d]. This skill can be used thrice per turn.

Dandegate Note: Since Cutie Pie's wordy effect is enhanced by Fortification Levels, the bottom has the effect description for easier readability and to highlight the changes better.
Cutie Pie: A summoned unit that inherits Basti’s initial attributes.

If enemy targets are within 5 tiles upon summoning, or if enemy targets spawn, end their action, or are passively displaced into the area, Cutie Pie self-destructs within the area, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 130% of attack and 2 points of Stability damage, and create [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within the area for 2 turns.

Additionally, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and 1 random powerful debuff to all enemy targets in the area for 2 turns, and restores HP equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of Stability Index to Basti.

A maximum of 3 summons can exist on the field at the same time.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Corrosion damage dealt by this unit, Corrosion damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. This effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.
